n.description: Number of patients (trials) in the binomial experiment, used as the n parameter in the binomial formula

p.description: Probability of success (treatment response) per trial, used as p^x in the binomial formula

q.description: Probability of failure per trial (1 - p), used as q^(n-x) in the binomial formula

x.description: Number of successes for which the probability is being calculated
